name: Oatmeal Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients: Combine 1 1/2 cups oatmeal, 1/2 cup whole wheat flour, 1 tbsp baking powder, 1 tbsp cinnamon, and 1 tsp nutmeg in a large bowl.
2. Mix the wet ingredients: In another bowl, whisk together 1 egg white, 1 old banana (or 2), 1 tbsp honey, and 1 to 2 cups nonfat milk until smooth.
3. Combine the mixtures: Pour the wet mixture into the dry mixture and stir until just combined. Do not overmix; a few lumps are okay.
4. Add raisins: Fold in 1/2 cup raisins.
5. Cook the pancakes: Heat a non-stick pan or griddle over medium heat. Drop about 1/4 cup of batter per pancake, spreading to desired thickness. Cook until bubbles form on the surface and edges are set (about 2-3 minutes). Flip and cook the other side until golden brown (about 1 minute).
6. Serve: Turn off the heat and serve the pancakes warm.
